headline: HP Inc. Declares Dividend
summary: PALO ALTO, Calif., June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) has declared a cash dividend of $0.3000 per share on the company’s common stock. The dividend, the fourth in HP’s fiscal year 2026, is payable on October 7, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on September 9, 2026. About HP Inc. HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) is a global technology leader redefining the Future of Work. Operating in more than 180 countries, HP delivers innovative and AI-powered devices, software

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In On 3 Tech Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks during market turbulence. Benzinga offers analyst ratings and news for high-yielding stocks in IT sector.
